known_limitations: Minimal reproducer of Conic Finance read-only reentrancy via Curve pool
Citation: https://rekt.news/conic-finance-rekt/ — Conic Finance exploited via read-only reentrancy (Jul 21 2023, ~$3.2M)
Citation: https://skynet.certik.com/ — CertiK analysis of Conic Finance read-only reentrancy
Vulnerable pattern: Curve pool ETH balance read AFTER callback — stale during reentrancy
Critical action gated by state: deposit share calculation
